step_rationale: Anti-apoptotic protein; miR-96-5p target regulating cardiomyocyte survival.
mechanism: BCL2L13 suppression by miR-96-5p promotes cardiomyocyte apoptosis during myocardial ischemia and infarction.

references.title: Serum miR-96-5p is a novel and non-invasive marker of acute myocardial infarction associated with coronary artery disease.
